transcript:
Speaker A (Human): ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದೀಯಾ? [What are you doing?]
Speaker B (AI): I sleeping. 'I am sleeping' ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ formal ಆಗಿ 'I am getting some sleep' ಅಂತ ಕೂಡ ಹೇಳಬಹುದು. [You should say 'I am sleeping'. To be a bit formal, you can also say 'I am getting some sleep'.]
Speaker A (Human): ಓ ಹೌದಾ, English ಹೇಗೆ ಕಲಿಯಬೇಕು? [Oh really, how to learn English?]
Speaker B (AI): ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಪ್ರತಿದಿನ 15 min daily practice ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ಸಾಕು, 1 month ಅಲ್ಲಿ English ಕಲಿಯಬಹುದು. [Just practice with me for 15 minutes daily, you can learn English in 1 month.]
Speaker A (Human): ಇದಕ್ಕೆ ತುಂಬಾ ಖರ್ಚು ಆಗುತ್ತಾ? [Does this cost a lot?]
Speaker B (AI): ಕೇವಲ 1 ರೂಪಾಯಿಗೆ ಈ app ಸಂಪೂರ್ಣವಾಗಿ try ಮಾಡಬಹುದು. 1 crores+ people ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ English ಕಲಿತಾ ಇದ್ದಾರೆ. [You can try this app completely for just 1 rupee. More than 1 crore people are learning English with me.]
Speaker A (Human): ಸೂಪರ್! ಹೇಗೆ ಜಾಯಿನ್ ಆಗೋದು? [Super! How to join?]
Speaker B (AI): ಈಗಲೇ MySivi app ಡೌನ್‌ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡಿ English ಕಲಿಯೋದನ್ನ ಶುರು ಮಾಡಿ. [Download the MySivi app right now and start learning English.]
Speaker C (Voiceover): Click on install now and download MySivi app.
on_screen_text:
ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದೀಯಾ? [What are you doing?]
sleeping.
I am sleeping ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. [You should say 'I am sleeping'.]
ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ formal ಆಗಿ 'i am getting some sleep' ಅಂತ ಕೂಡ ಹೇಳಬಹುದು. [To be a bit formal, you can also say 'i am getting some sleep'.]
ಓ ಹೌದಾ. english ಹೇಗೆ ಕಲಿಯಬೇಕು? [Oh really. How to learn english?]
ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಪ್ರತಿದಿನ 15 MIN daily practice ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ಸಾಕು, 1 month english ಕಲಿಯಬಹುದು. [Just practice 15 MIN daily with me, you can learn english in 1 month.]
ಇದಕ್ಕೆ ತುಂಬಾ ಖರ್ಚು ಆಗುತ್ತಾ? [Does this cost a lot?]
ಕೇವಲ 1 Rupee ಗೆ ಈ app ಸಂಪೂರ್ಣವಾಗಿ try ಮಾಡಬಹುದು [You can try this app completely for just 1 Rupee]
1 CRORES+ PEOPLE ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ english ಕಲಿಯುತ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. [1 CRORES+ PEOPLE are learning english with me.]
ಸೂಪರ್! ಹೇಗೆ ಜಾಯಿನ್ ಆಗೋದು? [Super! How to join?]
ಈಗಲೇ app ಡೌನ್‌ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡಿ english ಕಲಿಯೋದನ್ನು ಶುರು ಮಾಡಿ [Download the app right now and start learning english]
MySivi English speaking app
Install Now
summary: A split-screen ad in Kannada where a human learner interacts with an AI space-traveler avatar. The AI corrects common English mistakes, explains that users can learn English in one month with 15 minutes of daily practice, and offers a trial for just 1 rupee. The ad ends with a call to action to download the MySivi app.
